name: Mahwah Bergen Retail Group, Inc.
description: Mahwah Bergen Retail Group, Inc., formerly known as Ascena Retail Group, Inc., was a prominent American specialty retailer of apparel for women and tween girls. The company operated through various well-known brands, organizing its business into three primary segments: Premium Fashion, Plus Fashion, and Kids Fashion. Headquartered in Mahwah, New Jersey, the company focused on providing diverse clothing options across its retail portfolio. Following significant financial challenges and restructuring, the company underwent major changes, including bankruptcy proceedings and the divestiture of its various retail assets.
